chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 279 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3780/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.3781/2024. 21.11.2025 Matter is pending since 2020 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
